title: Applications of Metabolomics in Calcium Metabolism Disorders in Humans.
author: Podgorska B Wielogorska-Partyka M Godzien J Sieminska J Ciborowski M Szelachowska M Kretowski A Siewko K
content: S-EPMC9499180 PMC9499180 Applications of Metabolomics in Calcium Metabolism Disorders in Humans. The pathogenesis of the disorders of calcium metabolism is not fully understood. This review discusses the studies in which metabolomics was applied in this area. Indeed, metabolomics could play
